Item Class: Waystones
Rarity: Rare
Hate Trajectory
Waystone (Tier 15)
--------
Revives Available: 0 (augmented)
Item Rarity: +42% (augmented)
Pack Size: +9% (augmented)
Monster Rarity: +43% (augmented)
Waystone Drop Chance: +105% (augmented)
--------
Item Level: 81
--------
{ Prefix Modifier "Painful" (Tier: 1) }
17(15-19)% increased Monster Damage
{ Prefix Modifier "Frostbitten" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters deal 15(15-19)% of Damage as Extra Cold
{ Prefix Modifier "Fleeting" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters have 15(10-15)% increased Attack, Cast and Movement Speed
{ Suffix Modifier "of Smothering" (Tier: 1) }
Players have 40(40-36)% less Recovery Rate of Life and Energy Shield
{ Suffix Modifier "of Buffering" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters gain 13(12-25)% of maximum Life as Extra maximum Energy Shield
{ Suffix Modifier "of Obstruction" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters take 30(26-30)% reduced Extra Damage from Critical Hits
--------
Can be used in a Map Device, allowing you to enter a Map. Waystones can only be used once.
